description_long: This is an ornate porcelain teapot with a rounded body and a domed lid, featuring a prominent looped handle on top. The teapot is adorned with delicate, hand-painted floral motifs in soft pastel hues, primarily pinks and greens, which blend into the cream-colored background. The handles and lid finial are finished in a rich brown glaze, giving them a wood-like appearance and providing a striking contrast to the lighter body. The teapot has two side handles, each elegantly curved and attached at the shoulder and upper body, allowing for easy lifting and pouring. Fine crackle lines are visible on the surface, suggesting an antique or vintage style. The overall craftsmanship and decorative details indicate it is both functional and suitable for display.
description: A vintage porcelain teapot with hand-painted floral designs, brown looped handles, and a domed lid with a decorative finial. The cream body is accented by soft pastel flowers and wood-toned details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral motif, both side handles, and the domed lid with a looped finial.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting one handle and the brown-glazed attachment, with floral patterns faintly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to the front, showing the floral design and both handles, with the lid's finial clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the other handle and the lid's finial, with less floral detail visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: No visible spout; the design appears symmetrical with handles on both sides.
attribute_handle_design: Two side handles, each thick, curved, and looped, attached at the upper body and shoulder, finished in a brown glaze with a wood-like appearance.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a large looped finial, fits snugly over the opening.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Hand-painted floral patterns in soft pink and green, located on the body and lid, with subtle color transitions and a cream background.
